---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the problem or gap. E.g. "I wish the game supported..."

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references — anything that helps paint the picture.
